name: Spectre Cloak
description: Notes Part of the Spectral Sentry Rogue Set.
effects: Super Ghost Kamikazi Attack: Shooting while at full meter expells Ghostly Replicas that chase down enemies before exploding. Ghostly Replica: Deals 150 damage within 2sqrs. With Phantom Sickle: Ability meter fills twice as fast. With Reaper’s Shroud: Ghostly Replicas deal double damage. With Soul Necklace: Ghostly Replicas Curse enemies for 3 seconds within 2sqrs. Cooldown: 2 seconds Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 55 (+2 per WIS > 50) and 40% (+2% per WIS > 50) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds
